results.justification: EXACT TWIN — 3-stage pipeline + constraint-tightening + fixed-context attack frame IS the fixed initial-condition grip + technique-only constraint mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — adaptive environment + per-round victim fine-tune + adversarial co-evolution IS the attacker-defender symmetric capability adversarial-coevolution mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — hierarchical RL + token-level reward + autonomous adversary IS the technique-only reward shape + balance-disruption mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — adversarial preference learning + iterative pairwise + symmetric capability shape IS the symmetric attacker-defender A_sym=D_sym mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — minor perturbations induce global behavioral shifts + structured search-based red-teaming IS the technique-only minimal-perturbation balance-disruption mechanism.
Reward shaping + attacker-defender RL overlaps with technique-only reward + graceful-fall outcome reward shape mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — rotational perturbation + random phase θ rotation IS the circular-footwork rotational adversarial perturbation search mechanism.
Survey of red-teaming techniques + defenses + multi-turn overlaps with technique-only + balance-disruption mechanism.
